name: Lemon-Oatmeal Crispies
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Grated fresh or finely chopped dried lemon rind
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the vegetable oil and brown sugar until creamy.
2. Add the egg whites, lemon juice, grated lemon rind, and lemon flavoring. Mix until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, rolled oats, baking powder, and baking soda. Stir to blend.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the oil mixture while stirring at medium speed.
5. Add the crispy rice cereal and stir until combined.
6. Drop spoonfuls (level tablespoon) of the batter onto ungreased or lined cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack until room temperature.
